description: Reconfigure the PVE host: enable addon-ssl only (proxvex-signed cert for the web UI on :8006), no OIDC. Closes the base:none/ssl/reconfigure matrix cell. zitadel/default dependency is required to bootstrap the proxvex CA for the host's veContextKey — without it, webapp-ve-certificate-injector returns silently (no CA in this context) and server_key_b64/server_cert_b64 never reach the Write Certificates template. Mirrors proxmox/oidc-ssl's dependency.
